headline: 3 Bank Stocks We Find Risky
summary: Banks play a critical role in the financial system, providing everything from commercial loans to wealth management and payment processing services. Market leaders have certainly capitalized on rising interest rates and strong loan demand to boost profitability, helping fuel a 10.6% gain for the banking industry over the past six months. This performance has closely followed the S&P 500.
